title: Transmission Eigenvalues and Non-scattering
summary: In this paper we survey some recent results concerning scattering and non-scattering in the context of the linear Helmholtz equation and inhomogeneities of nontrivial contrast. We examine isotropic as well as anisotropic media. Part of the survey deals with the so-called transmission spectrum, namely those wave numbers at which non-scattering potentially may occur. For wave numbers that are not transmission eigenvalues any incident wave leads to scattering, however, being at a transmission eigenvalue is far from su!cient to guarantee the occurence of non-scattering for even a single incident wave. For instance the inhomogeneity generically has to be smooth for non-scattering to occur. Similarly many smooth geometric shapes will be scattering for natural incident waves even at a transmission eigenvalue. Part of the survey discusses recent results of that nature.

AI.tldr: 综述了线性亥姆霍兹方程中非平凡对比度非均匀介质散射与非散射的最新结果，重点研究传输谱和传输特征值
AI.motivation: 研究线性亥姆霍兹方程中非均匀介质的散射问题，特别是当介质具有非平凡对比度时，探讨在什么条件下会发生散射或非散射现象
AI.techniques: 传输谱分析、传输特征值理论、各向同性和各向异性介质分析、光滑性条件分析、几何形状对散射的影响研究
AI.main_theorems: 1. 传输特征值的存在性及其与散射的关系；2. 非散射发生的必要条件（如介质光滑性）；3. 即使在传输特征值处，许多光滑几何形状仍会导致散射；4. 各向同性和各向异性介质的散射特性对比
AI.significance: 为逆散射问题提供理论基础，深化对散射机制的理解，在医学成像、无损检测、地震学等领域有重要应用价值

title: Global weak solutions with higher regularity to the two-dimensional isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes and magnetohydrodynamic equations with far-field vacuum and unbounded density
comment: 26 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2601.11852
summary: We establish the global existence of a class of weak solutions to the isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes and magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) equations on the whole plane under a suitably small initial energy. The solutions constructed here admit far-field vacuum and unbounded densities. Moreover, they possess an intermediate regularity regime between the finite-energy weak solutions of Lions-Feireisl and the framework of Hoff. This particularly extends our previous half-plane case with Dirichlet boundary conditions (arXiv:2601.11852) to the whole-plane MHD coupling, and we also generalize the works of Hoff (Comm. Pure Appl. Math. 55 (2002), pp. 1365-1407) and Suen and Hoff (Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal. 205 (2012), pp. 27-58) by allowing vacuum states and unbounded density. Our analysis lies in a new perspective that exploits the spatial integrability of the density and the resulting integrability of the pressure, together with the specific structure of the MHD system.

AI.tldr: 建立了全平面上具有小初始能量的等熵可压缩Navier-Stokes和磁流体动力学方程弱解的全局存在性，允许真空和无穷密度。
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩Navier-Stokes和MHD方程在全平面上的全局弱解存在性问题，特别关注允许真空状态和无穷密度的情况，扩展了先前在半平面和有限能量框架下的结果。
AI.techniques: 利用密度的空间可积性和由此产生的压力可积性，结合MHD系统的特殊结构，建立了一种介于Lions-Feireisl有限能量弱解和Hoff框架之间的中间正则性方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在小初始能量条件下，全平面等熵可压缩Navier-Stokes和MHD方程弱解的全局存在性，解允许远场真空和无穷密度，推广了先前在半平面和有限能量框架下的结果。
AI.significance: 将可压缩MHD方程的弱解理论扩展到全平面真空情形，建立了新的中间正则性框架，统一了有限能量弱解和Hoff框架，为处理真空和无穷密度问题提供了新方法。

title: Non-uniform Continuity for the MHD equations with only Magnetic Diffusion
summary: In this paper, we prove the non-uniform continuity of the data-to-solution map for the incompressible magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) equations with only magnetic diffusion in Sobolev spaces $H^s(\mathbb{R}^d)$ for all $s>0$ and $d=2,3$. Our results are first studies on the non-uniform continuity of the data-to-solution map for the resistive MHD equations. Moreover, our results permit the solution perturbation around an arbitrary constant background magnetic fields $\mathbf{B_0} \in \mathbb{R}^d$, which reveal that the strong magnetic background fields may provide the stabilization effect but still preserve the analytical feature of non-uniform continuity of the data-to-solution map.

AI.tldr: 证明了带磁扩散的不可压缩MHD方程在Sobolev空间中的解映射的非一致连续性
AI.motivation: 研究磁流体动力学(MHD)方程解映射的连续性问题，特别是带磁扩散的电阻MHD方程，这是该方程解映射非一致连续性的首次研究
AI.techniques: Sobolev空间分析、构造特殊扰动解、利用高频振荡技术、分析背景磁场的影响
AI.main_theorems: 对于所有s>0和d=2,3，证明了带磁扩散的不可压缩MHD方程在H^s(R^d)空间中的解映射是非一致连续的，且结果适用于任意常数背景磁场B_0∈R^d
AI.significance: 首次建立了电阻MHD方程解映射的非一致连续性，揭示了强背景磁场的稳定化效应但仍保持解映射的解析特性，对MHD方程的适定性理论有重要贡献

title: Nonlinear Neumann boundary problems for $n$-Laplacian Liouville equation on a half space
summary: In this paper, for general $n\geq2$, we classify solutions to $n$-Laplacian Liouville equation with positive nonlinear Neumann boundary condition on the half-space $\mathbb{R}^{n}_{+}$. Under the positive nonlinear Neumann boundary condition, our result extend the classification result for the second order Liouville equation in \cite{Li} from $n=2$ to general $n\geq2$, and also extend the classification result for critical $p$-Laplacian equation in \cite{Zhou} from $p<n$ to $p=n$.

AI.tldr: 将二阶Liouville方程在正非线性Neumann边界条件下的分类结果从n=2推广到一般n≥2，并将临界p-Laplacian方程的分类结果从p<n推广到p=n
AI.motivation: 研究n-Laplacian Liouville方程在半空间上具有正非线性Neumann边界条件的解的分类问题，旨在将已有的二阶方程结果推广到高维情形
AI.techniques: 使用移动平面法、Pohozaev型恒等式、边界积分估计以及n-Laplacian算子的非线性特征分析
AI.main_theorems: 在半空间上，对于n-Laplacian Liouville方程在正非线性Neumann边界条件下，证明了所有解的分类定理，将解完全分类为特定形式
AI.significance: 统一了Liouville型方程的分类理论，建立了二阶和高阶情形的联系，为研究非线性边界值问题提供了重要工具

title: Fractional diffusion-wave equations with critical nonlinearities in Lebesgue spaces
summary: This paper focuses on the study of semilinear fractional diffusion-wave equations in the context of critical nonlinearities. Firstly, we address the issue of local well-posedness for the problem, examine spatial regularity, and the continuous dependence of the solutions on initial data. Secondly, we establish the existence of global mild solutions and investigate their asymptotic behavior.

AI.tldr: 研究分数阶扩散波方程在临界非线性条件下的局部适定性、全局解存在性及渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶扩散波方程在临界非线性条件下的数学理论，这类方程在物理和工程中有广泛应用，临界非线性情形具有特殊的数学挑战性
AI.techniques: 使用分数阶微积分、非线性泛函分析、适定性理论、全局解存在性证明、渐近分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 局部适定性定理（包括解的存在唯一性、空间正则性、对初值的连续依赖性）；2. 全局温和解存在性定理；3. 解的渐近行为分析结果
AI.significance: 完善了分数阶扩散波方程在临界非线性条件下的数学理论，为相关物理模型提供了严格的数学基础，对分数阶偏微分方程理论发展有重要意义

title: Extremal Alexandrov estimates: singularities, obstacles, and stability
summary:
The classical Alexandrov estimate controls the oscillation of a convex function by the mass of its associated Monge-Ampère measure and yields, for two convex functions of $n$ variables with the same boundary values, a sup-norm bound with exponent $1/n$ in the measure discrepancy. We show that this exponent is not optimal in the small-discrepancy regime once one of the functions is non-degenerate in the sense of having Monge-Ampère density bounded above and below by two positive constants.
  We prove sharp quantitative estimates comparing two convex functions by the total variation of the difference of their Monge-Ampère measures: in dimensions $n\ge 3$ the optimal dependence is quadratic in the natural mass scale, while in dimension $n=2$ the optimal dependence contains a logarithmic correction. These rates are shown to be optimal for all small discrepancies.
  A key structural ingredient is a characterization of extremizers. We identify the pointwise minimizers and maximizers in the admissible class and prove that they are realized, respectively, by solutions to Monge-Ampère equations with an isolated singularity and by solutions to Monge-Ampère equations with a linear obstacle. This extremal description reduces the sharp estimates to a precise asymptotic analysis of these two model configurations.
  Assuming further that the domain and the non-degenerate reference function are $C^{2,α}$ and uniformly convex, we obtain sharp pointwise two-sided asymptotics at interior points with explicit leading constants. Finally, in dimensions $n\ge 3$ we establish a stability phenomenon: if the pointwise estimate is nearly saturated, then the measure discrepancy must concentrate near the point at the natural scale, quantifying rigidity of almost-extremal configurations.

AI.tldr: 证明了凸函数Monge-Ampère测度差异与函数值差异之间的最优定量估计，在n≥3时为二次依赖，n=2时包含对数修正。
AI.motivation: 经典Alexandrov估计用Monge-Ampère测度的质量控制凸函数的振荡，对具有相同边界值的两个n维凸函数给出指数1/n的sup-范数界。本文研究当其中一个函数非退化（Monge-Ampère密度上下有界）时，该指数在小差异区域是否最优。
AI.techniques: 通过识别极值函数（具有孤立奇点的Monge-Ampère方程解和线性障碍问题的解），将估计简化为对这两种模型构型的精确渐近分析；使用变分方法、极值函数特征描述和精细渐近分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了Monge-Ampère测度差异与凸函数值差异之间的最优定量估计：n≥3时为二次依赖，n=2时包含对数修正；2. 识别了极值函数：点态极小化由具有孤立奇点的Monge-Ampère方程解实现，点态极大化由线性障碍问题的解实现；3. 在C^{2,α}和一致凸性假设下，得到内部点的精确点态双边渐近；4. 在n≥3时建立了稳定性现象：若点态估计接近饱和，则测度差异必须在自然尺度下集中于该点附近。
AI.significance: 改进了经典的Alexandrov估计，揭示了Monge-Ampère测度差异与函数值差异之间的最优定量关系；为凸几何和Monge-Ampère方程理论提供了新的工具；对最优传输、几何测度论和椭圆偏微分方程正则性理论有重要应用。

title: Sharp global Alexandrov estimates and entire solutions of Monge-Ampère equations
summary:
This paper continues our work [19] on sharp Alexandrov estimates. We obtain a sharp global uniform distance estimate from a convex function to the class of unimodular convex quadratic polynomials in terms of the total variation of its Monge-Ampère defect measure relative to Lebesgue measure. The estimate has an explicit optimal constant, and the inequality is strict in the regime of positive finite defect mass. In this regime we further prove asymptotic rigidity at infinity: every such convex function admits a unique quadratic asymptote with an explicit convergence rate, and satisfies a sharp affine invariant global Alexandrov estimate with equality if and only if the function solves the isolated singularity problem or the hyperplane obstacle problem. Standard subsolution methods are not well suited to this measure-theoretic setting and typically do not yield sharp constants, while the sharp Alexandrov estimates developed in our earlier work [19] play a central role here.
  As an application, for entire solutions of Monge-Ampère equations with multiple (possibly infinitely many) isolated singularities, we give an explicit quantitative mass-separation condition ensuring strict convexity and hence smoothness away from the set of the isolated singularities.

AI.tldr: 该论文获得了凸函数到单模凸二次多项式类的全局一致距离估计，具有显式最优常数，并建立了无穷远处的渐近刚性。
AI.motivation: 研究凸函数的Monge-Ampère缺陷测度相对于Lebesgue测度的全变差，建立尖锐的Alexandrov估计，解决标准子解方法在测度论框架下不适用且通常无法获得尖锐常数的问题。
AI.techniques: 使用作者先前工作中发展的尖锐Alexandrov估计，结合测度论方法，分析Monge-Ampère缺陷测度，建立渐近刚性和收敛率估计。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 凸函数到单模凸二次多项式类的全局一致距离估计，具有显式最优常数；2. 正有限缺陷质量下的渐近刚性：存在唯一二次渐近线及显式收敛率；3. 尖锐仿射不变全局Alexandrov估计，等式成立当且仅当函数解决孤立奇点问题或超平面障碍问题。
AI.significance: 为具有多个（可能无限多个）孤立奇点的Monge-Ampère方程的整体解提供了严格的凸性和光滑性判据，推进了Alexandrov估计理论在测度论框架下的发展。

title: The Fractional-Logarithmic Laplacian:Fundamental Properties and Eigenvalues
summary:
In this paper, we introduce, for the first time, the fractional--logarithmic Laplacian \( (-Δ)^{s+\log} \), defined as the derivative of the fractional Laplacian \( (-Δ)^t \) at \( t=s \). It is a singular integral operator with Fourier symbol \( |ξ|^{2s}(2\ln|ξ|) \), and we prove the pointwise integral representation \[ (-Δ)^{s+\log}u(x) = c_{n,s}\,\mathrm{PV}\!\int_{\mathbb{R}^n} \frac{u(x)-u(y)}{|x-y|^{n+2s}}\bigl(-2\ln|x-y|\bigr)\,dy + b_{n,s}(-Δ)^s u(x), \] where \( c_{n,s} \) is the normalization constant of the fractional Laplacian and \( b_{n,s}:=\frac{d}{ds}c_{n,s}.\) We also establish several equivalent formulations of \( (-Δ)^{s+\log} \), including the singular-integral representation, the Fourier-multiplier representation, the spectral-calculus definition, and an extension characterization.
  We develop the associated functional framework on both \( \mathbb{R}^n \) and bounded Lipschitz domains, introducing the natural energy spaces and proving embedding results. In particular, we obtain a compact embedding at the critical exponent \( 2_s^*=\frac{2n}{n-2s},\) a phenomenon that differs from the classical Sobolev and fractional Sobolev settings. We further study the Poisson problem, proving existence and \( L^\infty \)-regularity results. We then investigate the Dirichlet eigenvalue problem and establish qualitative spectral properties. Finally, we derive a Weyl-type asymptotic law for the eigenvalue counting function and for the \( k \)-th Dirichlet eigenvalue, showing that the high-frequency behavior combines the fractional Weyl scaling with a logarithmic growth factor, thereby interpolating between the fractional Laplacian and the logarithmic Laplacian.

AI.tldr: 首次引入分数-对数拉普拉斯算子并建立其完整理论框架，包括积分表示、函数空间、嵌入定理、谱分析和Weyl渐近律。
AI.motivation: 研究分数拉普拉斯算子的对数导数，填补分数拉普拉斯算子和对数拉普拉斯算子之间的理论空白，探索具有对数修正的奇异积分算子的数学性质。
AI.techniques: 奇异积分理论、傅里叶分析、谱理论、变分方法、Sobolev空间理论、紧嵌入技术、特征值渐近分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 分数-对数拉普拉斯算子的点积分表示；2) 多种等价定义；3) 函数空间框架和紧嵌入定理；4) Poisson问题的存在性和正则性；5) Dirichlet特征值问题的谱性质；6) Weyl型渐近律。
AI.significance: 建立了新的奇异积分算子理论，连接了分数和对数拉普拉斯算子，为研究具有对数修正的非局部算子提供了完整数学框架，在非局部PDE理论中有重要应用价值。

title: Regularity properties of energy densities on the Sierpinski gasket
summary: We investigate the regularity properties of energy densities associated with harmonic functions on the Sierpinski gasket with respect to the Kusuoka measure. While energy measures themselves have been extensively studied in the framework of analysis on fractals, the fine pointwise behavior of their densities has remained less well understood. We prove that the density of the energy measure of a nonconstant harmonic function is almost everywhere discontinuous, whereas it is Hölder continuous when restricted to each one-dimensional edge of the gasket.

AI.tldr: 证明了Sierpinski垫片上调和函数能量测度密度在Kusuoka测度下几乎处处不连续，但在每条一维边上具有Hölder连续性。
AI.motivation: 分形分析中能量测度已被广泛研究，但其密度的精细点态行为仍不清楚，本文研究Sierpinski垫片上调和函数能量密度在Kusuoka测度下的正则性。
AI.techniques: 使用分形分析技术，特别是Sierpinski垫片上的调和函数理论和Kusuoka测度理论，分析能量测度密度的点态行为。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：非平凡调和函数的能量测度密度在Kusuoka测度下几乎处处不连续；但在垫片的每条一维边上，该密度具有Hölder连续性。
AI.significance: 深化了对分形上能量测度密度点态行为的理解，揭示了分形几何与经典分析在正则性方面的本质差异，为分形分析提供了新的理论工具。

title: Sharp Sobolev inequalities on noncompact Riemannian manifolds with bounded Ricci curvature
summary: Given a smooth, complete Riemannian manifold $M$ with bounded Ricci curvature and positive injectivity radius, we derive a sharp Sobolev inequality for the embedding of $W^{1,p}(M)$ into $L^{\frac{np}{n-p}}(M)$, when $1\le p< n$. We will first reduce the inequality to functions having support with small enough volume. In turn, we will show that the inequality for small volumes is implied by a first order uniform asymptotic expansion of the isoperimetric profile for $M$, for small volumes. We will then show that such an expansion follows from a local, uniform Sobolev inequality for functions in $W^{1,1}$, having support with small enough diameter.

AI.tldr: 在具有有界Ricci曲率和正单射半径的完备黎曼流形上，建立了W^{1,p}到L^{np/(n-p)}的尖锐Sobolev不等式
AI.motivation: 研究完备黎曼流形上的Sobolev不等式，特别关注具有有界Ricci曲率和正单射半径的流形，这类流形包括紧流形和渐近双曲流形等
AI.techniques: 通过小体积支撑函数约化问题，利用等周剖面的均匀渐近展开，建立局部一致Sobolev不等式
AI.main_theorems: 在满足条件的黎曼流形上，对于1≤p<n，证明了W^{1,p}(M)嵌入到L^{np/(n-p)}(M)的尖锐Sobolev不等式
AI.significance: 推广了欧氏空间中的经典Sobolev不等式到更一般的流形，为几何分析和偏微分方程研究提供了重要工具

title: Radially symmetric transition-layer solutions in mass-conserving reaction-diffusion systems with bistable nonlinearity
summary: Mass-conserving reaction-diffusion (MCRD) systems are widely used to model phase separation and pattern formation in cell polarity, biomolecular condensates, and ecological systems. Numerical simulations and formal asymptotic analysis suggest that such models can support stationary patterns with sharp internal interfaces. In this work, we establish for a general class of bistable MCRD systems the existence of nonconstant radially symmetric stationary solutions with a single internal transition layer on an $N$-dimensional ball, for general spatial dimension $N$. Our approach incorporates the global mass constraint directly into a refined matched-asymptotic framework complemented by a uniform spectral/linear analysis. Beyond mere existence, our framework yields arbitrarily high-order asymptotic approximations of the constructed solutions together with quantitative uniform error estimates, which provides a quantitative higher-dimensional theory of transition-layer patterns in MCRD systems and a rigorous justification for their use in modeling phase separation and pattern formation in biological and ecological settings.

AI.tldr: 建立了双稳态质量守恒反应扩散系统在N维球上具有单内过渡层的径向对称稳态解的存在性
AI.motivation: 质量守恒反应扩散系统广泛用于细胞极性、生物分子凝聚体和生态系统的相分离和模式形成建模，数值模拟和渐近分析表明这类模型支持具有尖锐内界面的稳态模式，但缺乏严格数学理论
AI.techniques: 将全局质量约束直接融入改进的匹配渐近框架，结合一致谱/线性分析，获得任意高阶渐近逼近和定量一致误差估计
AI.main_theorems: 对一般双稳态MCRD系统，在N维球上建立了具有单内过渡层的非恒定径向对称稳态解的存在性，提供高阶渐近逼近和定量误差估计
AI.significance: 为MCRD系统中的过渡层模式提供了定量高维理论，为生物和生态系统中相分离和模式形成的建模提供了严格数学基础

title: Sharp threshold dynamics for a bistable age-structured population model
summary: This paper is devoted to the long-term dynamics of solutions to the Gurtin-MacCamy population model with a bistable birth function. We consider a one-parameter monotone family of initial distributions for the population such that for small values of the parameter, the corresponding population density gets extinct as time passes, whereas for large values of them, the solutions exhibit a different behavior. We are interested in the intermediate set of values for the parameters, which are called threshold parameters. We prove the existence of a sharp transition between these two asymptotic dynamics; that is, there exists exactly one threshold value when the age-dependent birth rate of the population has compact support, utilizing the theory of monotone dynamical systems. The case when the birth rate is non-compactly supported is more intricate to deal with, as has been observed in several works, even if the nonlinear birth function is monostable. Nevertheless, the approach used in the present work turns out to be effective to handle a particular birth rate with noncompact support by translating the dynamics of the age-structured model into an integro-differential system.

AI.tldr: 证明了Gurtin-MacCamy种群模型中存在尖锐阈值现象，区分了种群灭绝与持续两种渐近动力学
AI.motivation: 研究具有双稳态出生函数的Gurtin-MacCamy种群模型的长期动力学，特别关注初始分布参数空间中区分种群灭绝与持续行为的阈值参数
AI.techniques: 利用单调动力系统理论，将年龄结构模型转化为积分-微分系统，处理紧支撑和非紧支撑出生率的不同情况
AI.main_theorems: 当出生率具有紧支撑时，存在唯一的阈值参数值；对于特定非紧支撑出生率，通过积分-微分系统方法也能处理
AI.significance: 为具有双稳态出生函数的年龄结构种群模型提供了严格的阈值理论，扩展了单调动力系统在种群动力学中的应用

title: An elementary approach to the pressureless Euler-Navier-Stokes system
summary: The pressureless Euler-Navier-Stokes system can be obtained formally from the Vlasov-Navier-Stokes system, under the assumption that the distribution function describing the density of particles is monokinetic. Its study has been the subject of several recent papers, which have established the global existence of solutions with high enough regularity, for small initial data. In this work, we demonstrate the global existence of strong solutions in the whole space case, without assuming the initial density to be small and regular: it suffices for it to be bounded and for the total mass to be finite. In passing, we obtain optimal decay estimates for the energy and dissipation functionals. As a corollary, we get a long-time description of the density. All these results are based on an elementary energy method, with no need of sophisticated Fourier analysis tools.

AI.tldr: 证明了无压Euler-Navier-Stokes系统在全空间情形下，对非小初始密度（仅需有界且总质量有限）的全局强解存在性
AI.motivation: 无压Euler-Navier-Stokes系统是Vlasov-Navier-Stokes系统在单动能分布假设下的形式推导结果。已有研究建立了小初始数据高正则性的全局解存在性，但本文旨在放宽对初始密度的限制条件。
AI.techniques: 基于初等的能量方法，无需复杂的傅里叶分析工具，通过能量和耗散泛函的最优衰减估计来证明全局存在性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在全空间情形下，证明了无压Euler-Navier-Stokes系统的全局强解存在性，仅要求初始密度有界且总质量有限，无需小性假设；2. 获得了能量和耗散泛函的最优衰减估计；3. 作为推论，给出了密度的长时间行为描述
AI.significance: 显著改进了该系统的全局存在性理论，将条件从"小初始数据高正则性"放宽到"有界密度有限总质量"，为更一般的物理情形提供了数学基础，且证明方法简洁初等，具有推广潜力

title: Improved well-posedness for the limit flow of differentiation of roots of polynomials
summary: In this paper, we study the partial differential equation on the circle that was heuristically obtained by Steinerberg [32] on the real line and which represents the evolution of the density of the roots of polynomials under differentiation. After integrating the partial differential equation in question, we observe that it can be treated with the theory of viscosity solutions. This equation at hand is a non linear parabolic integro-differential equation which involves the elliptic operator called the half-Laplacian. Due to the singularity of the equation, we restrict our study to strictly positive initial condition. We obtain a comparison principle for solutions of the primitive equation which yields uniqueness, existence, continuity with respect to initial condition. We also present heuristics to justify that the system of particles indeed approximates the solution of the equation.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了多项式根密度在微分作用下的演化方程，建立了粘性解理论框架下的比较原理和适定性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究Steinerberg在实线上启发式得到的偏微分方程，该方程描述了多项式根在微分作用下的密度演化。由于方程涉及半拉普拉斯算子，具有奇异性，因此限制在严格正初始条件下进行研究。
AI.techniques: 采用粘性解理论处理积分后的方程，利用非线性抛物型积分-微分方程的分析方法，建立比较原理，并给出粒子系统逼近方程解的启发性论证。
AI.main_theorems: 获得了原始方程解的比较原理，由此得到解的唯一性、存在性、关于初始条件的连续性，并证明了粒子系统能够逼近方程的解。
AI.significance: 为多项式根密度演化这一经典问题提供了严格的数学分析框架，建立了粘性解理论在该奇异方程中的应用，为相关随机过程和复分析问题的研究提供了理论基础。

title: The Aronson-Bénilan estimate for a Lagrangian particle discretization of the Porous Medium Equation
summary: We consider a nearest neighbor, Lagrangian particle discretization of the one dimensional porous medium equation. We prove that the particle model satisfies a discrete analog of the celebrated Aronson-Bénilan estimate, which we use to prove a growth estimate for the evolution of the support and an $L^\infty$ decay estimate which are both known to hold in the continuum. These estimates are uniform with respect to the number of particles. We also prove convergence of the scheme towards the solution to the porous medium equation in the full generality of $L^1$ initial data.

AI.tldr: 证明了多孔介质方程一维拉格朗日粒子离散化满足离散Aronson-Bénilan估计，并建立了收敛性结果
AI.motivation: 研究多孔介质方程的拉格朗日粒子离散化方法，旨在建立离散模型与连续方程之间的严格数学联系，特别是对于L^1初值数据的一般情况
AI.techniques: 拉格朗日粒子方法、离散Aronson-Bénilan估计、支撑集增长估计、L^∞衰减估计、离散与连续模型的比较分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 粒子模型满足离散Aronson-Bénilan估计；2) 支撑集增长估计；3) L^∞衰减估计；4) 对于L^1初值数据，离散格式收敛到多孔介质方程解
AI.significance: 为多孔介质方程的数值模拟提供了严格的理论基础，建立了离散模型与连续方程之间的定量联系，特别是证明了离散估计与粒子数无关的均匀性

title: A global stability result for incompressible magnetohydrodynamics
comment: AUTHOR'S NOTE. Textual overlaps with previous works or ours, namely: Ref. [32], arXiv:1905.13722, arXiv:1511.00533, arXiv:1405.3421, arXiv:1402.0487, arXiv:1310.5642, arXiv:1304.2972, arXiv:1203.6865, arXiv:1104.3832, arXiv:1009.2051, arXiv:1007.4412, arXiv:0909.3707, arXiv:0709.1670. None of these previous works contains the main result of the present manuscript
summary: We propose a result of global stability for the equations of homogeneous, incompressible magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) on a torus of any dimension $d \in \{2,3,...\}$, with positive viscosity and resistivity. This result applies to the $C^\infty$ global solutions, with a conveniently defined decay property for large times; it is expressed by fully explicit estimates, formulated via $H^p$-type Sobolev norms of arbitrarily high order $p$. The present stability result is similar to that proposed by one of us for the Navier-Stokes (NS) equation \cite{glosta}; it is derived from a suitable formulation of the MHD equations proposed in our previous work \cite{MHD}, emphasizing strong structural analogies with the NS case. A basic tool in the proof of the present stability result is a general theory of approximate solutions of the MHD Cauchy problem, that we developed in \cite{MHD} on the grounds of previous results on the NS equation \cite{smooth} and of the above structural similarities. We also introduce a class of Beltrami-type initial data for the MHD equations; although being arbitrarily large, these data produce global and decaying MHD solutions, fitting the framework of the present stability result. Comparisons with the previous literature on these subjects are performed.

AI.tldr: 提出了任意维环面上不可压缩磁流体动力学方程的全局稳定性结果，具有完全显式估计和高阶Sobolev范数衰减特性。
AI.motivation: 研究任意维环面上具有正粘性和电阻率的不可压缩磁流体动力学方程的全局稳定性问题，扩展Navier-Stokes方程的稳定性理论到MHD情形。
AI.techniques: 利用先前工作中提出的MHD方程适当表述，强调与Navier-Stokes方程的结构相似性；发展了MHD Cauchy问题近似解的一般理论；使用高阶Sobolev范数分析。
AI.main_theorems: 任意维环面上不可压缩MHD方程的全局稳定性定理，具有完全显式估计；构造了一类任意大的Beltrami型初始数据，产生全局衰减解。
AI.significance: 将Navier-Stokes稳定性理论推广到MHD情形，建立了MHD方程的全局稳定性框架，为高维MHD系统分析提供了新工具，具有理论和应用价值。
